name: Raisin Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Stir in margarine and raisins, and boil uncovered for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and cool the raisin mixture to lukewarm.
3. Stir in sugar substitute. Dissolve baking soda in 1/4 cup warm water; add to raisin mixture, stirring well.
4. Add eggs to the raisin mixture, stirring thoroughly.
5. Combine flour, ground cloves, allspice, and cinnamon. Gradually mix into the raisin mixture, stirring after each addition. Stir in eggs.
6. Pour batter into a 10-inch Bundt pan coated with vegetable cooking spray.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes to 1 hour or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool cake in the Bundt pan for 10 minutes. Remove from pan and let cool on a wire rack.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 170; CHO: 22mg; CAR: 24gm; PRO: 3gm; SODIUM: 222mg
